Necro lvl 20
▲ Page top
Perchasable
QuoteReply
# Jun 21 2001 at 1:33 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592248576252
Sage
178 posts
In addition to dropping off of mobs, bloodstones are purchasable from spell component vendors in most necro guilds. This would make sense as bloodstones are a necro spell component. I believe you can get them from the necros under freeport. I know that you can buy them from the necro guild in Cabilis.
▲ Page top
Bloodstones
QuoteReply
# Jun 14 2001 at 11:44 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591758476986
Scholar
62 posts
For those not in the know, these are used as a component for the Necro spell Harmshield. They can be stacked and are lo weight - a higher level Bone Chip.

Markoff Chaney
Gnecro of the 22nd Death
▲ Page top
RE: bloodstone
QuoteReply
